title: stachys distans var. cllicica
intro: Stachys distans var. cilicica, also known as Turkish betony or White betony, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in the mountainous regions of Turkey and the Middle East. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Stachys distans var. cilicica include relieving headaches, migraines, and anxiety, as well as soothing digestive issues and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
